name: Sound Effect
desc: Plays a named sound at a world position with volume and pitch.

implementation.overview: S29PacketSoundEffect plays a positioned sound. Sound names: random.explode, mob.creeper.primed, ambient.weather.thunder, random.splash, random.bow, random.break, game.hostile.swim, step.stone, step.grass, mob.wither.spawn. SoundLocator modules (Gugustus, Augustus b2.6) track sound positions to estimate entity locations behind walls. BackTrack modules (Actinium) use S29 to predict explosion forces.

modules.name: SoundLocator (Gugustus)
modules.purpose: Listen for S29 sound packets and record the source position + sound type. Used to detect nearby entities by their sound effects — creeper primed, explosions, lightning strikes.
modules.how_it_works: When S29 arrives with a known sound name, the module reads the position (x/8, y/8, z/8) and stores it with a timestamp and sound type. These positions can be displayed on ESP or used by other modules. For 'random.splash' within 3 blocks of the fishing bobber, some clients auto-reel.
modules.vanilla_hook: NetHandlerPlayClient.handleSoundEffect(S29PacketSoundEffect) — plays the sound at the given position.

implementation.general_hooks:
Client: NetHandlerPlayClient.handleSoundEffect(S29PacketSoundEffect). SoundLocator reads position/sound type.

Server: WorldServer.playSoundAtEntity() broadcasts S29 to tracking players.
